**Acme Corp — Client Performance Assessment Summary**

Sarah Jenkins of Acme Corp, a 5,000-employee enterprise software company, is the organizer and decision sponsor for a recurring SaaS Performance and Infrastructure Review. She sits at the intersection of engineering priorities and budget authority — signing off on cloud spend, unblocking procurement, and greenlighting the local-first migration strategy that engineering has been pushing. Her communication style is direct and deadline-driven; ...

{
  "Key Briefing Items": [
    "The June 15 local dry-run deadline is the meeting's anchor — Sarah approved this transition specifically to bypass cloud API throttling, so the session must reinforce accountability around that commitment.",
    "Q3 budget sign-off has a hard deadline of June 12, and procurement remains fully blocked until Sarah acts — this meeting is the last natural push before that window closes.",
    "Two items on the agenda still require Sarah's formal approval — the local ...
